STEEL ROOF RIPPED OFF OF LUMBER COMPANY BUILDING. POSSIBLE TORNADO. TIME ESTIMATED.

A NATIONAL WEATHER SERVICE STORM SURVEY CONFIRMED A WEAK EF0 TORNADO ABOUT 3 MILES SOUTH OF CADILLAC. THE TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN AT 656 PM...TEARING THE ROOF OFF AN OUT BUILDING AT A LUMBER YARD. THE TORNADO WAS ONLY ON THE GROUND BRIEFLY, LIFTING BY 658 PM. THE TOTAL PATH LENGTH WAS ESTIMATED AT 100 YARDS, WITH MAXIMUM WINDS OF 65 MPH.
